chunks.title: The Beloved's Location
chunks.reason: A question from the women followed by the Shulammite's answer about her beloved's whereabouts.

chunks.title: Praise of Beauty
chunks.reason: The king praises the Shulammite's beauty and uniqueness compared to other women.

chunks.title: Journey to the Garden
chunks.reason: The Shulammite describes her movement through the garden and being caught up by the chariots.

chunks.title: Call to Return
chunks.reason: The women invite the Shulammite to return and behold her.
